transcript.detail: Added admin edit access to satisfy SPEC-002; owner edit remains

Current implementation correctly allows owner edit (SPEC-001) and org admin edit (SPEC-002) while denying non-owners without role. Cross-org and suspended checks are in place. No modifications required.

Checked owner-edit and org-admin-edit commitments. Code correctly allows edit for same-org owners and admins, denies edit for others. Cross-org and suspended checks are correct. Denies handling does not conflict. No modifications required.
